purpose: Creator ledger for the 200-row YouTube Shorts fragrance transcript-bearing pool.
scope: Observed handles/channels represented in the admitted pool; cross-lane joining aid only.

ledger_policy.brand_account_posture: brand/platform accounts stay in the ledger but are not called independent creators
ledger_policy.transcript_policy: no transcript bodies are stored in this ledger

creators.identity_boundary: observed YouTube handle/channel in the Shorts pool; not verified person identity, ownership, or independence

accepted_residuals: The ledger records observed YouTube handles/channels, not legal identity, ownership, or independent-creator status.
Some prior admitted rows have label abstains/off-topic residuals; the ledger does not certify row relevance.
Channel IDs are unavailable for some hard-30 rows because that fixture did not retain the field in git metadata.
Brand/platform accounts are kept for pool traceability and marked separately from creator/channel observations.
